item.title: Nintendo GameCube – Nintendo Classics adds Pokemon XD: Gale of Darkness
item.content:encoded:
• Switch 2

Fight against an evil organization using Shadow Pokemon.

Pokemon XD: Gale of Darkness is now available via the Nintendo GameCube – Nintendo Classics app for Switch 2, Nintendo announced.

Here is an overview of the game, via the back of its box:

Experience The Extra Dimension!

Using Shadow Pokemon, an evil organization has unleashed a sinister plot of world domination. With Eevee as your companion, and with the help of numerous friends along the way, you must fight against terrible foes and race against time to snag and purify the Shadow Pokemon and save the world!

Watch a trailer below.

Launch Trailer

Japanese



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/03/nintendo-gamecube-nintendo-classics-adds-pokemon-xd-gale-of-darkness
